attacking_style: Not an attacker; finishes races in sprint scenarios, typically in reduced bunch or selective finishes rather than pure flat sprints.
team_tactics: Teams invest leadout resources but execution frequently misaligns with rider's actual form or positioning capabilities, leading to suboptimal results.
terrain_preference: Selective or reduced sprint finishes after hard racing (247km classics, hilly stages). Struggles in pure power sprints against top-tier fastmen.
vulnerability: Lacks top-end sprint speed against elite sprinters; positioning fragility in technical finales; form inconsistency undermines team leadout investments.
key_patterns: Repeated runner-up finishes in similar scenarios showing consistent ceiling below elite sprinters (3 observations)
Team leadout efforts frequently wasted through rider form deficit or tactical miscalculation (2 observations)
Late-race crash vulnerability and positioning errors in finale kilometers (2 observations)
Better results in attritional races than pure sprint showdowns (2 observations)
form_trajectory: negative: consecutive second places in 2020 Tour suggest plateau, with earlier 2020 sixth place and 2017-2019 struggles indicating declining competitiveness
